    C

    CustomGameProfile - Class in dev.yanianz.star.skins
     

    D

    dev.yanianz.star.skins - package dev.yanianz.star.skins
    The skins module allows you to apply a PlayerSkin to blocks or items.
    dev.yanianz.star.skins.nms - package dev.yanianz.star.skins.nms
    This package contains all the NMS code of our skins module.

    F

    forUsername(Plugin, String) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.skins.UUIDLookup
    Deprecated.
    This has been Deprecated since 1.3.1 now use UUIDLookup.getUuidFromUsername(Plugin, String)
    fromBase64(String) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.skins.PlayerSkin
     
    fromBase64(UUID, String) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.skins.PlayerSkin
    Deprecated.
    use PlayerSkin.fromBase64(UUID, String, URL)
    fromBase64(UUID, String, URL) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.skins.PlayerSkin
     
    fromHashCode(String) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.skins.PlayerSkin

    G

    get() - Static method in interface dev.yanianz.star.skins.nms.PlayerHeadAdapter
     
    getBase64Texture() - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.skins.CustomGameProfile
    Get the base64 encoded texture from the underline GameProfile.
    getItemStack(PlayerSkin) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.skins.PlayerHead
    This Method will simply return the Head of the specified Player
    getItemStack(OfflinePlayer) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.skins.PlayerHead
    This Method will simply return the Head of the specified Player
    getProfile() - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.skins.PlayerSkin
     
    getUuidFromUsername(Plugin, String) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.skins.UUIDLookup
    Returns the CompletableFuture with the UUID
